title: Vividness
description: Enhance Minecraft with vivid, vibrant colors - a simple color grading shader.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/d9gDKZacyHo" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe># Vividness

Transform your Minecraft world with enhanced, vibrant colors!

## ✨ What is Vividness?

Vividness is a lightweight color grading shaderpack that makes your Minecraft world more lively and colorful without heavy performance impact. It enhances the vanilla experience with brighter skies, more vibrant grass, and deeper water colors.

## 🎨 Features

- **+8% Brightness** - Clearer visibility
- **+25% Saturation** - More vibrant colors
- **+12% Contrast** - Sharper visuals
- **Enhanced Blue Tones** - Brighter skies and deeper oceans
- **Enhanced Green Tones** - Livelier grass and foliage
- **Warm Color Temperature** - Natural, comfortable look

## 🚀 Performance

- **Extremely lightweight** - Only color grading, no heavy effects
- **No impact on FPS** - Runs smoothly on most systems
- **Compatible with most resource packs**

## 📦 Requirements

- Minecraft Java Edition 1.16+
- **OptiFine** or **Iris Shaders**

## 🔧 Installation

1. Download the shaderpack
2. Place the `.zip` file in `.minecraft/shaderpacks/`
3. Select "Vividness" in Video Settings > Shaders

## ⚙️ Customization

You can adjust the color grading values by editing `shaders/composite.fsh`:
- Brightness: `adjustBrightness(color, 1.08)`
- Saturation: `adjustSaturation(color, 1.25)`
- Contrast: `adjustContrast(color, 1.12)`

Enjoy your more vibrant Minecraft experience! 🎮✨
